<section id="api-reference">
<h1>API Reference</h1>
<p>This section documents the Python API for using epub2text as a library.</p>
<section id="core-classes">
<h2>Core Classes</h2>
<section id="epubparser">
<h3>EPUBParser</h3>
<dl class="py class">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="epub2text.EPUBParser">
<span class="property"><span class="k"><span class="pre">class</span></span><span class="w"> </span></span><span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">epub2text.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">EPUBParser</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">filepath</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">paragraph_separator</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">'\n\n'</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/epub2text/parser/#EPUBParser"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Bases: <a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#object" title="(in Python v3.14)"><code class="xref py py-class docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">object</span></code></a></p>
<p>Parse EPUB files to extract chapters and metadata.</p>
<p>Supports both NAV HTML (EPUB3) and NCX (EPUB2) navigation formats.
Handles nested chapter structures and accurately slices content between
navigation points.</p>
<dl class="py method">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="epub2text.EPUBParser.__init__">
<span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">__init__</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">filepath</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">paragraph_separator</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">'\n\n'</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/epub2text/parser/#EPUBParser.__init__"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Initialize parser with EPUB file.</p>
<dl class="simple">
<dt>Args:</dt><dd><p>filepath: Path to the EPUB file
paragraph_separator: String to use between paragraphs (default: “nn”)</p>
</dd>
<dt>Raises:</dt><dd><p>FileNotFoundError: If file doesn’t exist
ValueError: If file is not a valid EPUB</p>
</dd>
</dl>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py method">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="epub2text.EPUBParser.get_metadata">
<span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">get_metadata</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference internal" href="#epub2text.Metadata" title="epub2text.models.Metadata"><span class="pre">Metadata</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/epub2text/parser/#EPUBParser.get_metadata"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Extract metadata from EPUB.</p>
<dl class="simple">
<dt>Returns:</dt><dd><p>Metadata object with title, authors, etc.</p>
</dd>
</dl>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py method">

<span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">get_chapters</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">include_text</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">True</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#epub2text.Chapter" title="epub2text.models.Chapter"><span class="pre">Chapter</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/epub2text/parser/#EPUBParser.get_chapters"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Extract all chapters from the EPUB using navigation.</p>
<dl class="simple">
<dt>Args:</dt><dd><dl class="simple">
<dt>include_text: If True, include full chapter text. If False, return only</dt><dd><p>metadata (title, id, level, char_count). Default: True.</p>
</dd>
</dl>
</dd>
<dt>Returns:</dt><dd><p>List of Chapter objects</p>
</dd>
</dl>
</dd></dl>

class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">True</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">skip_toc</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">False</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">include_chapter_title</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">False</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/epub2text/parser/#EPUBParser.extract_chapters"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Extract text from selected chapters.</p>
<dl>
<dt>Args:</dt><dd><p>chapter_ids: List of chapter IDs to extract. If None, extract all.
deduplicate_chapter_titles: If True, removes duplicate chapter titles</p>
<blockquote>
<div><p>that appear as the first line of chapter content (default: True)</p>
</div></blockquote>
<p>skip_toc: If True, skip TOC and front matter chapters (default: False)
include_chapter_title: If True, includes chapter titles in the output</p>
<blockquote>
<div><p>(default: False)</p>
</div></blockquote>
</dd>
<dt>Returns:</dt><dd><p>Combined text from all selected chapters with chapter titles separated
by 4 linebreaks before the title and 2 linebreaks after.</p>
</dd>
</dl>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py method">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="epub2text.EPUBParser.get_pages">
<span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">get_pages</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">synthetic_page_size</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">int</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">2000</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">use_words</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">False</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#epub2text.Page" title="epub2text.models.Page"><span class="pre">Page</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/epub2text/parser/#EPUBParser.get_pages"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Extract pages from the EPUB.</p>
<p>First attempts to use EPUB page-list navigation (original print pages).
If no page-list is found, generates synthetic pages based on content.</p>
<dl>
<dt>Args:</dt><dd><dl class="simple">
<dt>synthetic_page_size: Size of synthetic pages in characters (default: 2000)</dt><dd><p>or words if use_words=True (default: ~350 words)</p>
</dd>
</dl>
<p>use_words: If True, synthetic_page_size is interpreted as word count</p>
</dd>
<dt>Returns:</dt><dd><p>List of Page objects</p>
</dd>
</dl>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py method">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="epub2text.EPUBParser.has_page_list">
<span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">has_page_list</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/epub2text/parser/#EPUBParser.has_page_list"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Check if the EPUB contains a page-list navigation.</p>
<dl class="simple">
<dt>Returns:</dt><dd><p>True if page-list navigation exists, False otherwise</p>
</dd>
</dl>
</dd></dl>

class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Extract text from selected pages.</p>
<dl>
<dt>Args:</dt><dd><p>page_numbers: List of page numbers to extract. If None, extract all.
deduplicate_chapter_titles: If True, removes duplicate chapter titles</p>
<blockquote>
<div><p>that appear as the first line of page content (default: True)</p>
</div></blockquote>
<p>skip_toc: If True, skip pages from TOC/Introduction chapter (default: False)</p>
</dd>
<dt>Returns:</dt><dd><p>Combined text from all selected pages with chapter titles separated
by 4 linebreaks before the title and 2 linebreaks after.</p>
</dd>

<p>Represents a single page in an EPUB.</p>

<dl class="simple">
<dt>Args:</dt><dd><p>content: Full text content with chapter titles separated by 4 linebreaks
chapters: List of Chapter objects
title: Book title
epub_path: Path to the EPUB file (for bookmarks)
page_size: Lines per page (None for auto-detect)
show_header: Show header with chapter title
show_footer: Show footer with progress
start_line: Initial line to display
start_chapter: Initial chapter index to jump to
bookmark_manager: Optional bookmark manager instance
width: Maximum content width (None for full terminal width)</p>
</dd>
</dl>
</dd></dl>

<dd><p>Run the interactive reader.</p>
<dl class="simple">
<dt>Returns:</dt><dd><p>ReaderState with final position</p>
</dd>
</dl>
</dd></dl>

</dd></dl>

class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">True</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">preserve_single_newlines</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">False</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/epub2text/cleaner/#TextCleaner.__init__"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Initialize text cleaner with options.</p>
<dl>
<dt>Args:</dt><dd><dl class="simple">
<dt>remove_page_numbers: Remove standalone and end-of-line page</dt><dd><p>numbers</p>
</dd>
</dl>
<p>remove_footnotes: Remove bracketed footnote markers like [1]
replace_single_newlines: Replace single newlines with spaces</p>
<blockquote>
<div><p>(preserve paragraphs)</p>
</div></blockquote>
<p>normalize_whitespace: Collapse multiple spaces to single space
preserve_single_newlines: Keep single newlines as paragraph</p>
<blockquote>
<div><p>separators (overrides replace_single_newlines)</p>
</div></blockquote>
</dd>
</dl>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py method">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="epub2text.TextCleaner.clean">
<span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">clean</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">text</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/epub2text/cleaner/#TextCleaner.clean"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Clean text with configured options.</p>
<dl class="simple">
<dt>Args:</dt><dd><p>text: Raw text to clean</p>
</dd>
<dt>Returns:</dt><dd><p>Cleaned text</p>
</dd>
</dl>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py method">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="epub2text.TextCleaner.apply_gutenberg_spacing">
<span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">apply_gutenberg_spacing</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">text</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/epub2text/cleaner/#TextCleaner.apply_gutenberg_spacing"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Apply Gutenberg Project formatting: two spaces after sentences and colons.</p>
<dl class="simple">
<dt>Args:</dt><dd><p>text: Text to format</p>
</dd>
<dt>Returns:</dt><dd><p>Text with Gutenberg spacing</p>
</dd>
</dl>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py method">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="epub2text.TextCleaner.calculate_length">
<span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">calculate_length</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">text</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">int</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/epub2text/cleaner/#TextCleaner.calculate_length"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Calculate text length excluding chapter markers and metadata.</p>
<dl class="simple">
<dt>Args:</dt><dd><p>text: Text to measure</p>
</dd>
<dt>Returns:</dt><dd><p>Character count</p>
</dd>
</dl>
</dd></dl>

</dd></dl>

</section>

class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">text</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" class="pre">replace_single_newlines</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">preserve_single_newlines</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">False</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/epub2text/cleaner/#clean_text"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Clean text with smart options (convenience function).</p>
<dl class="simple">
<dt>Args:</dt><dd><p>text: Raw text to clean
remove_page_numbers: Remove standalone and end-of-line page numbers
remove_footnotes: Remove bracketed footnote markers like [1]
replace_single_newlines: Replace single newlines with spaces
normalize_whitespace: Collapse multiple spaces to single space
preserve_single_newlines: Keep single newlines as paragraph separators</p>
</dd>
<dt>Returns:</dt><dd><p>Cleaned text</p>
</dd>

</dd></dl>

</section>
<section id="text-formatting">
<h2>Text Formatting</h2>
<section id="format-paragraphs">
<h3>format_paragraphs</h3>
<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="epub2text.formatters.format_paragraphs">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">epub2text.formatters.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">format_paragraphs</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">text</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">separator</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">'</span>&#160; <span class="pre">'</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">one_line_per_paragraph</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">False</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/epub2text/formatters/#format_paragraphs"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Format text with paragraph separators.</p>
<p>This function works without phrasplit.</p>
<dl class="simple">
<dt>Args:</dt><dd><p>text: Input text with paragraph breaks (double newlines)
separator: String to prepend to new paragraphs (default: “  “ two spaces)
one_line_per_paragraph: If True, collapse each paragraph to single line</p>
</dd>
<dt>Returns:</dt><dd><p>Formatted text with separator at start of each new paragraph.
Chapter titles (lines preceded by 4+ newlines) are preserved.</p>
</dd>
</dl>
</dd></dl>

</section>
<section id="format-sentences">
<h3>format_sentences</h3>
<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="epub2text.formatters.format_sentences">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">epub2text.formatters.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">format_sentences</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">text</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">separator</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">'</span>&#160; <span class="pre">'</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">language_model</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">'en_core_web_sm'</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/epub2text/formatters/#format_sentences"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Format text with one sentence per line.</p>
<dl class="simple">
<dt>Args:</dt><dd><p>text: Input text with paragraph breaks
separator: String to prepend at paragraph boundaries (default: “  “)
language_model: spaCy language model to use</p>
</dd>
<dt>Returns:</dt><dd><p>Text with one sentence per line, separator at paragraph boundaries.
Chapter titles are preserved.</p>
</dd>
</dl>
</dd></dl>

</section>
<section id="format-clauses">
<h3>format_clauses</h3>
<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="epub2text.formatters.format_clauses">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">epub2text.formatters.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">format_clauses</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">text</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">separator</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">'</span>&#160; <span class="pre">'</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">language_model</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">'en_core_web_sm'</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/epub2text/formatters/#format_clauses"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Format text with one clause per line (split at commas).</p>
<p>Uses spaCy for sentence detection, then splits each sentence at commas.
The comma stays at the end of each clause, creating natural pause points
for text-to-speech processing.</p>
<p>Requires phrasplit to be installed.</p>
<dl>
<dt>Args:</dt><dd><p>text: Input text with paragraph breaks
separator: String to prepend at paragraph boundaries (default: “  “)
language_model: spaCy language model to use</p>
</dd>
<dt>Returns:</dt><dd><p>Text with one clause per line, separator at paragraph boundaries.
Chapter titles are preserved.</p>
</dd>
<dt>Example:</dt><dd><p>Input: “I do like coffee, and I like wine.”
Output:</p>
<blockquote>
<div><p>“I do like coffee,
and I like wine.”</p>
</div></blockquote>
</dd>
</dl>
</dd></dl>

</section>
<section id="split-long-lines">
<h3>split_long_lines</h3>
<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="epub2text.formatters.split_long_lines">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">epub2text.formatters.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">split_long_lines</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">text</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">max_length</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">int</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">separator</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">'</span>&#160; <span class="pre">'</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">language_model</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">'en_core_web_sm'</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/epub2text/formatters/#split_long_lines"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Split lines exceeding max_length at clause/sentence boundaries.</p>
<p>Strategy:
1. First try to split at sentence boundaries
2. If still too long, split at clause boundaries (commas, semicolons, etc.)
3. If still too long, split at word boundaries</p>
<dl class="simple">
<dt>Args:</dt><dd><p>text: Input text (may already be formatted)
max_length: Maximum line length in characters
separator: Paragraph separator (preserved)
language_model: spaCy language model to use</p>
</dd>
<dt>Returns:</dt><dd><p>Text with long lines split. Chapter titles are preserved.</p>
</dd>
</dl>
</dd></dl>

</section>
<section id="collapse-paragraph">
<h3>collapse_paragraph</h3>
<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="epub2text.formatters.collapse_paragraph">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">epub2text.formatters.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">collapse_paragraph</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">paragraph</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/epub2text/formatters/#collapse_paragraph"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Collapse a paragraph to a single line.</p>
<p>Replaces internal newlines with spaces.</p>
<dl class="simple">
<dt>Args:</dt><dd><p>paragraph: Single paragraph text</p>
</dd>
<dt>Returns:</dt><dd><p>Paragraph as single line</p>
</dd>
</dl>
</dd></dl>

</section>
<section id="split-paragraphs">
<h3>split_paragraphs</h3>
<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="epub2text.formatters.split_paragraphs">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">epub2text.formatters.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">split_paragraphs</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">text</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/phrasplit/splitter/#split_paragraphs"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Split text into paragraphs (separated by double newlines).</p>
<p>Applies preprocessing to fix hyphenated line breaks and normalize whitespace.</p>
<dl class="simple">
<dt>Args:</dt><dd><p>text: Input text</p>
</dd>
<dt>Returns:</dt><dd><p>List of paragraphs (non-empty, stripped)</p>
</dd>
</dl>
</dd></dl>

</section>
</section>
<section id="compatibility-function">
<h2>Compatibility Function</h2>
<section id="epub2txt">
<h3>epub2txt</h3>
<dl class="py function">

class="pre">None</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">allowed_schemes</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">('https',</span> <span class="pre">'http')</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/epub2text/#epub2txt"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Extract text from EPUB file (compatibility function for old epub2txt API).</p>
<dl>
<dt>Args:</dt><dd><p>filepath: Path to EPUB file or URL
outputlist: If True, return list of chapter texts; if False,</p>
<blockquote>
<div><p>return single string</p>
</div></blockquote>
<p>clean: If True, apply text cleaning; if False, minimal processing
timeout: Connection/read timeout for URL downloads (seconds)
max_bytes: Maximum allowed download size for URLs
user_agent: Optional User-Agent header for URL downloads
allowed_schemes: Allowed URL schemes for downloads</p>
</dd>
<dt>Returns:</dt><dd><p>Either a single string of all text (outputlist=False) or list of
chapter texts (outputlist=True)</p>
</dd>
<dt>Examples:</dt><dd><div class="doctest highlight-default notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="gp">&gt;&gt;&gt; </span><span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">epub2txt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;book.epub&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="gp">&gt;&gt;&gt; </span><span class="n">chapters</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">epub2txt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;book.epub&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">outputlist</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="gp">&gt;&gt;&gt; </span><span class="n">raw_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">epub2txt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;book.epub&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">clean</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="gp">&gt;&gt;&gt; </span><span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">epub2txt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;https://example.com/book.epub&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</dd>
</dl>
</dd></dl>

</section>
</section>
<section id="usage-examples">
<h2>Usage Examples</h2>
<section id="basic-usage">
<h3>Basic Usage</h3>
<p>Parse an EPUB file and extract metadata:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">epub2text</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">EPUBParser</span>

<span class="n">parser</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">EPUBParser</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;book.epub&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Get metadata</span>
<span class="n">metadata</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parser</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_metadata</span><span class="p">()</span>
<span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Title: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Authors: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="s1">&#39;, &#39;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">authors</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Language: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">language</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Get all chapters</span>
<span class="n">chapters</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parser</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_chapters</span><span class="p">()</span>
<span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chapter</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_count</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">,</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> characters&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Extract all text</span>
<span class="n">full_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parser</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extract_chapters</span><span class="p">()</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="working-with-pages">
<h3>Working with Pages</h3>
<p>Extract and work with pages:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">epub2text</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">EPUBParser</span>

<span class="n">parser</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">EPUBParser</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;book.epub&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Check if EPUB has page-list navigation</span>
<span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">parser</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">has_page_list</span><span class="p">():</span>
    <span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;EPUB contains original page numbers&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Get pages (from page-list or generate synthetic pages)</span>
<span class="n">pages</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parser</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_pages</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">synthetic_page_size</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">2000</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">use_words</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">page</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">pages</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Page </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">page</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">page_number</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">page</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_count</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> chars&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;  Source: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">page</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;  Chapter: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">page</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Extract text organized by pages</span>
<span class="n">page_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parser</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extract_pages</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">page_numbers</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;1&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;2&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;3&quot;</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">deduplicate_chapter_titles</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">skip_toc</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span>  <span class="c1"># Skip table of contents</span>
<span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="chapter-selection">
<h3>Chapter Selection</h3>
<p>Extract specific chapters:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">epub2text</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">EPUBParser</span>

<span class="n">parser</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">EPUBParser</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;book.epub&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">chapters</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parser</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_chapters</span><span class="p">()</span>

<span class="c1"># Extract first 3 chapters</span>
<span class="n">chapter_ids</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parser</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extract_chapters</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapter_ids</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="custom-text-cleaning">
<h3>Custom Text Cleaning</h3>
<p>Apply custom cleaning options:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">epub2text</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">EPUBParser</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">TextCleaner</span>

<span class="n">parser</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">EPUBParser</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;book.epub&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parser</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extract_chapters</span><span class="p">()</span>

<span class="c1"># Custom cleaning</span>
<span class="n">cleaner</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">TextCleaner</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">remove_footnotes</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">remove_page_numbers</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">normalize_whitespace</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">replace_single_newlines</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">cleaned_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">cleaner</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">clean</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="sentence-formatting">
<h3>Sentence Formatting</h3>
<p>Format text with one sentence per line:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">epub2text</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">EPUBParser</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">epub2text.formatters</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">format_sentences</span>

<span class="n">parser</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">EPUBParser</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;book.epub&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parser</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extract_chapters</span><span class="p">()</span>

<span class="c1"># One sentence per line</span>
<span class="n">formatted</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">format_sentences</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">separator</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;  &quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="clause-formatting">
<h3>Clause Formatting</h3>
<p>Format text with one clause per line:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">epub2text</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">EPUBParser</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">epub2text.formatters</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">format_clauses</span>

<span class="n">parser</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">EPUBParser</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;book.epub&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parser</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extract_chapters</span><span class="p">()</span>

<span class="c1"># One clause per line (split at commas, semicolons)</span>
<span class="n">formatted</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">format_clauses</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">separator</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;  &quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="line-splitting">
<h3>Line Splitting</h3>
<p>Split long lines at clause boundaries:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">epub2text</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">EPUBParser</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">epub2text.formatters</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">split_long_lines</span>

<span class="n">parser</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">EPUBParser</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;book.epub&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parser</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extract_chapters</span><span class="p">()</span>

<span class="c1"># Split lines exceeding 80 characters</span>
<span class="n">split_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_long_lines</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">max_length</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">80</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="url-support">
<h3>URL Support</h3>
<p>Extract from EPUB files hosted online:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">epub2text</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">epub2txt</span>

<span class="c1"># Download and extract from URL</span>
<span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">epub2txt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;https://example.com/book.epub&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Get list of chapters from URL</span>
<span class="n">chapters</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">epub2txt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;https://example.com/book.epub&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">outputlist</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="bookmark-management">
<h3>Bookmark Management</h3>
<p>Manage reading bookmarks:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">epub2text.bookmarks</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">BookmarkManager</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Bookmark</span>

<span class="c1"># Create bookmark manager (uses ~/.epub2text/bookmarks.json)</span>
<span class="n">manager</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">BookmarkManager</span><span class="p">()</span>

<span class="c1"># Save bookmark</span>
<span class="n">bookmark</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Bookmark</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">create</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">chapter_index</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">3</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">line_offset</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">150</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">percentage</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mf">45.5</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">title</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;My Book Title&quot;</span>
<span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">manager</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">save</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;/path/to/book.epub&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">bookmark</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Load bookmark</span>
<span class="n">bookmark</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">manager</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">load</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;/path/to/book.epub&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">bookmark</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Resume at </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">bookmark</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">percentage</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">.1f</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">%&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># List all bookmarks</span>
<span class="n">all_bookmarks</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">manager</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">list_all</span><span class="p">()</span>
<span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">bm</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">all_bookmarks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">items</span><span class="p">():</span>
    <span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">bm</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">bm</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">percentage</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">.1f</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">%&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="full-metadata-access">
<h3>Full Metadata Access</h3>
<p>Access all Dublin Core metadata fields:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">epub2text</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">EPUBParser</span>

<span class="n">parser</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">EPUBParser</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;book.epub&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">metadata</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parser</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get_metadata</span><span class="p">()</span>

<span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Title: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Authors: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">authors</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Contributors: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">contributors</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Publisher: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">publisher</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Publication Year: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">publication_year</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Identifier: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">identifier</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Language: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">language</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Rights: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rights</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Coverage: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">coverage</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Description: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">description</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
</section>
<section id="module-index">
<h2>Module Index</h2>
<section id="epub2text">
<h3>epub2text</h3>
<p>Main package exports:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">EPUBParser</span></code> - Main parser class</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">Chapter</span></code> - Chapter data model</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">Page</span></code> - Page data model</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">PageSource</span></code> - Page source enumeration</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">Metadata</span></code> - Metadata data model</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">TextCleaner</span></code> - Text cleaning class</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">clean_text</span></code> - Convenience function for text cleaning</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">epub2txt</span></code> - Compatibility function</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">Bookmark</span></code> - Bookmark data model</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">BookmarkManager</span></code> - Bookmark management class</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">EpubReader</span></code> - Interactive terminal reader</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">ReaderState</span></code> - Reader state data model</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="epub2text-formatters">
<h3>epub2text.formatters</h3>
<p>Text formatting utilities:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">format_paragraphs</span></code> - Format text with paragraph separators</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">format_sentences</span></code> - One sentence per line formatting</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">format_clauses</span></code> - One clause per line formatting</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">split_long_lines</span></code> - Split long lines at clause boundaries</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">split_paragraphs</span></code> - Split text into paragraph list</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">collapse_paragraph</span></code> - Collapse paragraph to single line</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="epub2text-cleaner">
<h3>epub2text.cleaner</h3>
<p>Text cleaning utilities:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">TextCleaner</span></code> - Configurable text cleaner class</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">clean_text</span></code> - Convenience function</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">calculate_text_length</span></code> - Calculate text length excluding markers</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="epub2text-bookmarks">
<h3>epub2text.bookmarks</h3>
<p>Bookmark management:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">Bookmark</span></code> - Bookmark data class</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">BookmarkManager</span></code> - Bookmark persistence manager</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="epub2text-reader">
<h3>epub2text.reader</h3>
<p>Interactive terminal reader:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">EpubReader</span></code> - Main reader class</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">ReaderState</span></code> - State information when reader exits</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
</section>
</section>
</div>
<script data-sphinxpress-script="search" defer>
(function () {
  "use strict";

  function initForm(form) {
    var input = form.querySelector(".tool-search-input");
    var results = form.querySelector(".tool-search-results");
    var navList = form.parentElement
      ? form.parentElement.querySelector(".tool-nav-list")
      : null;
    if (!input || !results) {
      return;
    }
    var emptyText = form.getAttribute("data-search-empty") || "No matches.";
    var indexUrl = form.getAttribute("data-search-index");
    if (!indexUrl) {
      hideForm();
      return;
    }

    var indexEntries = null;
    var indexError = false;
    var pendingQuery = null;

    function hideForm() {
      form.style.display = "none";
    }

    function escapeHtml(value) {
      return value
        .replace(/&/g, "&amp;")
        .replace(/</g, "&lt;")
        .replace(/>/g, "&gt;")
        .replace(/"/g, "&quot;")
        .replace(/'/g, "&#39;");
    }

    function showEmpty() {
      results.innerHTML =
        '<p class="tool-search-empty">' + escapeHtml(emptyText) + "</p>";
      results.hidden = false;
      if (navList) {
        navList.hidden = true;
      }
    }

    function clearResults() {
      results.innerHTML = "";
      results.hidden = true;
      if (navList) {
        navList.hidden = false;
      }
    }

    function renderResults(entries, tokens) {
      if (!entries.length) {
        showEmpty();
        return;
      }
      var html = entries
        .map(function (entry) {
          var snippetHtml = renderSnippet(entry, tokens);
          var href = entry.url + "#sphinxpress-search-hit";
          return (
            '<li class="tool-search-result">' +
            '<a href="' +
            escapeHtml(href) +
            '">' +
            '<p class="tool-search-result-title">' +
            escapeHtml(entry.title) +
            "</p>" +
            '<p class="tool-search-result-snippet">' +
            snippetHtml +
            "</p>" +
            "</a>" +
            "</li>"
          );
        })
        .join("");
      results.innerHTML = html;
      results.hidden = false;
      if (navList) {
        navList.hidden = true;
      }
    }

    function renderSnippet(entry, tokens) {
      var source = entry.snippet || "";
      if (!source) {
        return "";
      }
      var lower = source.toLowerCase();
      var firstToken = tokens[0] || "";
      var idx = lower.indexOf(firstToken);
      if (idx < 0) {
        return escapeHtml(source);
      }
      var before = source.slice(0, idx);
      var match = source.slice(idx, idx + firstToken.length);
      var after = source.slice(idx + firstToken.length);
      return (
        escapeHtml(before) +
        "<mark>" +
        escapeHtml(match) +
        "</mark>" +
        escapeHtml(after)
      );
    }

    function runQuery(query) {
      if (!indexEntries) {
        return;
      }
      var tokens = query
        .toLowerCase()
        .split(/\s+/)
        .filter(function (token) {
          return token.length > 0;
        });
      if (!tokens.length) {
        clearResults();
        return;
      }
      var hits = [];
      for (var i = 0; i < indexEntries.length; i += 1) {
        var entry = indexEntries[i];
        if (!entry.sections || !entry.sections.length) {
          continue;
        }
        var matched = true;
        var score = 0;
        for (var t = 0; t < tokens.length; t += 1) {
          var token = tokens[t];
          var found = false;
          var tokenScore = 0;
          for (var s = 0; s < entry.sections.length; s += 1) {
            var section = entry.sections[s];
            var lowerText = section.lower || "";
            if (!lowerText) {
              continue;
            }
            var from = 0;
            while (from <= lowerText.length) {
              var foundAt = lowerText.indexOf(token, from);
              if (foundAt < 0) {
                break;
              }
              tokenScore += 1;
              from = foundAt + token.length;
            }
            if (tokenScore > 0) {
              found = true;
            }
          }
          if (!found) {
            matched = false;
            break;
          }
          score += tokenScore;
        }
        if (matched) {
          hits.push({ entry: entry, score: score });
        }
      }
      hits.sort(function (a, b) {
        return b.score - a.score;
      });
      var top = hits.slice(0, 20).map(function (hit) {
        return hit.entry;
      });
      renderResults(top, tokens);
    }

    function handleInput() {
      var query = input.value || "";
      if (!query.trim()) {
        clearResults();
        pendingQuery = null;
        return;
      }
      if (indexError) {
        hideForm();
        return;
      }
      if (indexEntries) {
        runQuery(query);
      } else {
        pendingQuery = query;
      }
    }

    input.addEventListener("input", handleInput);

    fetch(indexUrl, { credentials: "same-origin" })
      .then(function (response) {
        if (!response.ok) {
          throw new Error("HTTP " + response.status);
        }
        return response.json();
      })
      .then(function (payload) {
        if (
          !payload ||
          !Array.isArray(payload.entries) ||
          payload.entries.length === 0
        ) {
          hideForm();
          return;
        }
        indexEntries = payload.entries;
        if (pendingQuery) {
          runQuery(pendingQuery);
        }
      })
      .catch(function () {
        indexError = true;
        if (input.value && input.value.trim()) {
          hideForm();
        } else {
          hideForm();
        }
      });
  }

  function init() {
    var forms = document.querySelectorAll("form.tool-search");
    for (var i = 0; i < forms.length; i += 1) {
      initForm(forms[i]);
    }
  }

  if (document.readyState === "loading") {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", init);
  } else {
    init();
  }
})();

</script>
{% endraw %}
